channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gavin Williams Emerges as Cleveland Guardians' Key Trade-Proof Player
item.description: The Cleveland Guardians are off to a strong start in the 2026 MLB season, holding a 27-22 record and leading the American League Central by two games over the Chicago White Sox. Much of their success ...

item.title: Millennial business founders lobby Albanese government over capital gains tax changes in budget
item.description: A group of 40 Australian entrepreneurs aged under 40 have written to Prime Minister Anthony Albanese urging him to reconsider parts of the government’s capital gains tax overhaul announced in the fede...

item.title: KNCCI Raises Concerns Over Illicit Tobacco Risks in Proposed Tobacco Bill
item.description: The Kenya National Chamber of Commerce and Industry (KNCCI) has raised serious concerns over the Tobacco Control (Amendment) Bill, 2024, warning that it could increase costs for businesses and worsen ...

item.title: Zia Adiong and Renee Co appointed as House spokespersons for VP Sara Duterte's Senate impeachment trial
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – Representatives Zia Alonto Adiong of Lanao del Sur and Renee Co of Kabataan have been officially designated as spokespersons for the House of Representatives’ prosecution panel i...

item.title: Former Woodstock mayor sentenced following sexual assault convictions, additional sentences forthcoming
item.description: The former mayor of Woodstock has been sentenced to jail following multiple convictions in sexual assault cases, with additional sentencing hearings still pending. Authorities have confirmed that the ...

item.title: Joburg Mayor Seeks Urgent Meeting with Minister to Address Eskom Debt and Prevent Power Cut
item.description: Johannesburg mayor Dada Morero has urgently reached out to electricity minister Kgosientsho Ramokgopa to prevent the city from being plunged into a blackout due to an unpaid debt of R5.2 billion to Es...

item.title: Examining the Impact of Islamophobia on the Muslim American Community After the San Diego Mosque Attack
item.description: A recent shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego left three worshipers dead and heightened fears within the Muslim American community. Investigators discovered anti-Islamic writings in the suspect...

item.title: Kolkata Police Arrest Main Accused in Park Circus Violence
item.description: Kolkata police have successfully arrested Faridul Islam, who has been identified as the principal conspirator behind the violent attack on security personnel in the Park Circus area during a protest a...

item.title: Assistant Protocol Officer Passes Away at Indian High Commission in Chattogram
item.description: Naren Dhar, who was serving as an Assistant Protocol Officer at the Indian High Commission in Chattogram, Bangladesh, was found dead on Tuesday morning inside the mission premises. He was discovered i...

item.title: Trevor Birtch, Former Woodstock Mayor, Receives Prison Sentence for Sexual Assault Convictions
item.description: Trevor Birtch, the former mayor of Woodstock, Ontario, has been sentenced to four years and eight months in prison after being convicted of two counts of sexual assault. The assaults, which occurred i...

item.title: Panorama documentary exposes serious allegations of rape and sexual assault on Married at First Sight UK
item.description: A new Panorama documentary, The Dark Side of Married at First Sight, has revealed deeply troubling allegations of rape and sexual assault made by three former participants in Channel 4’s popular reali...

item.title: Matatu Strike Continues as Government and Operators Fail to Reach Agreement
item.description: Commuters across Kenya continue to face serious disruptions as the nationwide matatu strike drags into its second day. Talks between government officials, led by Transport Cabinet Secretary Davis Chir...

item.title: Study finds one in five pregnant people in Ontario missed proper syphilis screening
item.description: A recent study published in the Canadian Medical Association Journal has revealed that one in five pregnant individuals in Ontario did not receive proper syphilis screening between 2018 and 2023. The ...

item.title: TikTok Removes Over 820,000 Videos and Bans Accounts in Kenya for Safety
item.description: In the last quarter of 2025, TikTok removed a total of 820,552 videos in Kenya as part of its ongoing efforts to enforce community safety and content guidelines. Most of the removals, nearly 99.9%, we...

item.title: South Africa to Chair SADC Meeting Following G20 Dispute with US
item.description: South Africa will host a special Southern African Development Community (SADC) Foreign Ministers meeting at Skukuza in the Kruger National Park from 22 to 24 May 2026, chaired by Minister Ronald Lamol...

item.title: Surrey Police Look Into Alleged Child Sexual Abuse Connected to Epstein Documents
item.description: The news article reportedly discussed an ongoing investigation by Surrey Police into allegations of child sexual abuse connected to documents associated with Jeffrey Epstein. Epstein, a financier who ...

item.title: Defendant in Ian Watkins murder trial denies harming baby he is accused of assaulting
item.description: In a murder trial at Leeds Crown Court, John McGowan-Fazakerley, aged 32, has given evidence denying that he ever harmed a baby he is accused of sexually assaulting. The case relates to the killing of...

item.title: Potential Impacts of Proposed Changes to U.S. Radiation Protection Standards
item.description: Recent developments in the United States have raised significant concerns regarding proposed changes to radiation protection standards. In May 2025, a Presidential Directive (EO 14300) instructed the ...

item.title: Hayden Panettiere Reveals Uncomfortable Encounters with Famous Men in New Memoir
item.description: In her new memoir, 'This Is Me: A Reckoning,' actress Hayden Panettiere recounts unsettling experiences with well-known men in the entertainment industry. At 19, she attended a party where a respected...

item.title: Norwegian journalist questions PM Modi on press freedom during Oslo visit, triggers online debate
item.description: During a joint press meet in Oslo with the Norwegian Prime Minister, Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi did not take any questions from the media. As he was leaving the podium, Helle Lyng Svendsen, a...
